name: io.routescore/mcp
description: Read-only pre-sign evidence checks for onchain swaps: modeled route quality, modeled MEV/execution exposure, token registry recognition, and a clear/caution/unsupported verdict. Decision support, not execution.
title: Routescore

environmentVariables.name: ROUTESCORE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Routescore API key (rs_live_...), free to mint on any tier. The check_swap tool is on the free agent tier (free 100/day, Pro 1,000, Power 10,000); modeled-quote + scenario tools require Power. Generate one at https://www.routescore.io/account. Shown once.

environmentVariables.name: ROUTESCORE_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (default https://www.routescore.io). For local development use http://localhost:3000.
